properties.label: Number Strobes
properties.description: How many strobe flashes are active at the same time. Higher values create a denser strobe field.

properties.label: Strobe Duration
properties.description: How many frames each strobe flash remains visible before fading out. Higher values make flashes linger longer.

properties.label: Strobe Type
properties.description: Shape of each strobe flash. Type 1 is a single pixel, type 2 adds a random cross arm, type 3 is a full plus shape, and type 4 alternates between plus and X shapes.

properties.label: Reacts to music
properties.description: When enabled, the number of active strobes scales with the current music volume level.
